name: reprosight
description: Evidence-driven AI visual repair for frontend defects

scripts.build: npm run build -w @reprosight/core && npm run build -w @reprosight/cli && npm run build -w @reprosight/benchmark && npm run build -w @reprosight/dashboard
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @reprosight/core && npm run typecheck -w @reprosight/cli && npm run typecheck -w @reprosight/benchmark && npm run typecheck -w @reprosight/dashboard
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @reprosight/core && npm run lint -w @reprosight/cli && npm run lint -w @reprosight/benchmark
scripts.test: npm run test -w @reprosight/core && npm run test -w @reprosight/cli && npm run test -w @reprosight/benchmark
